mapper.select: SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title,rownum FROM (SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title FROM tour WHERE areacode=1 AND contenttypeid=12 ORDER BY hit DESC ) WHERE rownum=1

SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title,rownum FROM (SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title FROM tour WHERE areacode=6 AND contenttypeid=12 ORDER BY hit DESC ) WHERE rownum<=4

SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title,rownum FROM (SELECT contentid,firstimage,addr1,likecount,replycount,title FROM tour WHERE areacode=39 AND contenttypeid=12 ORDER BY hit DESC ) WHERE rownum<=4
SELECT no,name,type,poster,likecount,replycount,address,rownum FROM (SELECT no,name,type,poster,likecount,replycount,address FROM food ORDER BY hit DESC ) WHERE rownum<=7
